거부기린은 PC 웹캠을 통해 사용자의 자세를 실시간으로 분석해요.\n모든:
Geobokin analyzes your posture in real time through your PC webcam.
All processing happens locally on your PC, and no video is sent to any server.
안녕하세요! {{userName}}님의 자세 건강을 책임질 AI 파트너,: Hello! I'm Geobokin, your AI partner dedicated to {{userName}}'s posture health.
영상은 사용자의 PC에서만 처리되며, 어디에도 저장되거나 전송되지 않으니: Rest assured, video is processed only on your PC and is never stored or transmitted anywhere.
이제부터 {{userName}}님이 일하는 동안 웹캠을 통해 실시간으로: From now on, I'll analyze your posture in real time via webcam while you work, {{userName}}.
The giraffe and turtle in the small widget at the top of your screen provide real-time posture feedback.
주간, 월간 단위의 개인화 통계와 패턴 분석을 통해 나도 몰랐던 나의 자: Discover posture habits you never knew you had through weekly and monthly personalized statistics and pattern analysis.
Experience voluntary and lasting change with personalized tips suggested by AI.
자세가 심하게 나빠지거나 스트레칭이 필요한 순간을 AI가 정확하게 포착하: AI accurately detects when your posture significantly worsens or when you need to stretch, and smartly notifies you.
We've added gamification elements to break the stereotype that health management is boring.
바른 자세를 유지할수록 나의 캐릭터가 레벨업하고 더 빨리 달려 보상을 받: The better your posture, the more your character levels up, runs faster, and earns rewards.
이제부터 거부기린과 함께 거북목을 개선해볼까요?: Shall we start improving your forward head posture with Geobokin?
